Registry / Terms / mains power

mains power

—Not in VIM/VIML G 18 #02373 · 4 instances

Suggested actions

  1. HIGH No authoritative definition in VIM or VIML.
  2. MEDIUM 4 distinct definitions — harmonise.

Publication instances

4 distinct definitions across 4 publications.

4 unique definitions (each used by only one publication)

Ed.YearPublicationClauseG 18 #Definition
20102008OIML R 99-1:20083.3702372
(E primary external source of electrical power for the instrument, including all sub assemblies. xamples: public power network (AC or DC), generator, external battery or other DC supply systems)
pending
202X2021OIML R060:2021A.1.1303211
primary external source of electrical power for an instrument, including all sub-assemblies. (Examples: public or local power grid (AC or DC) or external generator
pending
20102004OIML D 11:20043.2100254
primary external source of electrical power for an instrument, including all sub-assemblies. (Examples: public power (AC or DC), generator, external battery or other DC supply systems)
pending
202X2008OIML R 99-1:20083.3702373
primary external source of electrical power for the instrument, including all sub-assemblies. (Examples: public power network (AC or DC), generator, external battery or other DC supply systems) [adapted from OIML D 11:2004, 3.21]
pending
